source.description: Built-in image generation output extracted from the Codex session transcript, converted to JPEG, and saved as the raster master.
source.notes: Step frames are raster derivatives of the same saved master image, using masked reveals of the generated drawing rather than separately prompted artwork.

process_strategy: Reveal the same lantern drawing in large construction decisions: base, glass globe and wire guard, top cap, side supports, handle with small details and color, then final keeper-line strength.

final_elements.name: rounded lantern base
final_elements.description: The wide teal cylinder and lower rim that anchor the lantern.

final_elements.name: front knobs and lower burner plate
final_elements.description: The center control knob, side cap, and small shelf above the base.

final_elements.name: glass globe
final_elements.description: The rounded transparent chamber sitting above the base.

final_elements.name: crossed wire guard
final_elements.description: The two diagonal wires crossing in front of the glass.

final_elements.name: candle and warm glow
final_elements.description: The small candle cup and pale yellow glow inside the globe.

final_elements.name: vent cap and top lid
final_elements.description: The domed teal top, vent band, holes, and small knob above the globe.

final_elements.name: side supports
final_elements.description: The two dark side rails and ring joints that hold the lantern frame.

final_elements.name: arched carrying handle
final_elements.description: The tall curved handle looping over the top of the lantern.

final_elements.name: spark marks and small accents
final_elements.description: The tiny star marks, vent holes, and lower oval accents that finish the cozy glow.

final_elements.name: teal and yellow colored-pencil shading
final_elements.description: The restrained teal metal shading and warm yellow light that complete the drawing.

frames.visible_job: Reveals the lower base, front control knob, side cap, and burner plate before the tall frame is added.
introduces: front knobs and lower burner plate

frames.step_name: Add the globe and wire guard
frames.visible_job: Adds the rounded glass chamber, crossed front guard wires, and small candle cup above the base.
Adds the domed top cap, vent band, little holes, and top knob without changing the base or globe.
Adds the two side support rails and ring joints that connect the base to the top.

frames.step_name: Curve the handle and add color
frames.visible_job: Adds the arched handle, small spark marks, accent details, teal metal shading, and warm yellow glow already visible in the finished sketch.

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens existing contours, glow texture, metal shading, and paper grain without adding new lantern parts.
allowed_changes: paper texture from the saved master

rejection_checks: No base, globe, wire, support, handle, spark mark, or core color choice should first appear in the final image.
The lantern must keep the same upright centered pose and proportions in every frame.
The final image must not add mechanical complexity that is absent from the process frames.
Do not use separately prompted step images that drift from this master drawing.
